docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NOGARA REPORTING SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIYAKE, STEVEN DBA LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN MIYAKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIYAKE, STEVEN DBA LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN MIYAKE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOGARA REPORTING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIYAKE, STEVEN DBA LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN MIYAKE $3,527.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,527.00, PER WRITTEN STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MIYAKE, STEVEN DBA LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN MIYAKE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-10-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-18-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLED WITH INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS.
